Canceling a Competition

Competitions can be canceled only by the competition creator by using XOnlineCompetitionCancel. The competition continues to show up on players' lists of competitions in the canceled state for a further 48 hours. This enables all entrants to see that the competition has been canceled.

The suggested client behavior is to disallow canceling a competition that has already started.

Competitions that do not have at least the minimum number of entrants registered (as specified at competition creation) at registration close will be automatically canceled.

By default, competitions are removed from the server seven days after they are completed or canceled. Your title can alter this setting when it calls XOnlineCompetitionCreate. Pass the new time limit (in days) as the value for the XONLINE_COMP_ATTR_COMP_CLEANUP attribute in the pCompetitionAttributes parameter.
